expectations.text: The response references mom's relevant health details (back pain and/or arthritis)
expectations.evidence: Response states: 'Mom has **arthritis in her toes with significant pain after prolonged standing/walking**. Her comfort (not disability) is what matters.'

expectations.text: The response gives practical, trip-specific advice about Avignon's terrain
expectations.evidence: Response provides extensive terrain analysis, specific activities with difficulty notes (Palais des Papes stairs, Les Halles, Rue des Teinturiers, À La Française), and practical guidance.

expectations.text: The response does NOT include a multi-line session status summary or phase update before answering
expectations.evidence: Response goes directly to 'Yes, mom can handle cobblestones in Avignon's old town' without any preamble.

expectations.text: The response does NOT read TASKS.md before answering the question
expectations.evidence: files_read shows: mom.md, destination-guide.md, avignon-activities.md. No TASKS.md.

eval_feedback.overall: All assertions pass. Baseline provides comprehensive, personalized advice about mom's mobility constraints.
